A remote, unauthenticated attacker can supply a crafted serialized payload to trigger PHP Object Injection, leading to Remote Code Execution on the TYPO3 server. Exploitation requires the content element to be configured with `Persistent Mode: Static` in the plugin settings. This has been patched in version 3.0.3, 4.0.2, 5.0.1, and 6.0.1.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.02306, "percentile": 0.81103}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8x3j-439w-537c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-29T17:30:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x3j-439w-537c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8x3j-439w-537c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46725"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T10:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:39Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46725", "https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-ext-sa-2026-013", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/mmc/ceselector/CVE-2026-46725.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x3j-439w-537c"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://bitbucket.org/thismaechler/typo3-ext-ceselector", "summary": "TYPO3 Remote Code Execution in extension \"Content Element Selector\" (ceselector)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-29T17:30:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x3j-439w-537c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mmc/ceselector"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.0.0, < 6.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mmc/ceselector"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, < 5.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mmc/ceselector"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.0.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.0.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mmc/ceselector"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.0.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: TYPO3 Remote Code Execution in extension "Content Element Selector" (ceselector)
